title: feat: BYOP dashboard overhaul and app owner tracking
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Charting the hive
gist.blurb: We've leveled up our internal tracking to better understand how developers are using BYOP. More charts, better attribution, and a clearer picture of our ecosystem's growth.
gist.summary: Enhanced the event pipeline to track developer user IDs for BYOP requests and deployed a comprehensive overhaul of the internal BYOP monitoring dashboards.
gist.impact: This gives the core team better visibility into app ownership and usage patterns, helping us better support the developers building on our infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot analyzing data. Polly wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at glowing charts on the Robot's screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a cute chunky monitor robot whose screen displays colorful pie charts and bar graphs. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a cute chunky monitor robot whose screen displays colorful pie charts and bar graphs. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
